assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types throughout the priority matrix and code examples, including auto-upgrade scheduled, available version updates, end-of-life warnings, and security patches

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Priority matrix correctly assigns security patches with HIGH/CRITICAL CVE ratings to CRITICAL priority, and available version updates to MEDIUM priority (informational new versions to LOW)

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: End-of-life warnings are marked as action required with specific timelines (<30 days = CRITICAL, 30-90 days = HIGH) and the code includes deadline extraction and upgrade planning

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Auto-upgrade notifications are categorized as CRITICAL/HIGH priority requiring action, and the response template specifically mentions 'Reviewing upgrade compatibility', 'Preparing rollback plan', and 'Monitoring setup verification'

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Security patches are marked as CRITICAL priority with immediate action required (0-7 days), and the response template mentions 'Scheduling emergency maintenance' for security patches

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Available version updates are classified as MEDIUM priority with 'Plan Ahead (1-3 months)' timeline and marked as action_required=False in the code, clearly indicating they're for planning purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: The response focuses on email notification triage and Slack integration but does not mention setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes, focusing instead on notification content parsing and triage
